emailLog.subject: Quote Q-0001 — Action Required: Please Sign
emailLog.body:
Dear Jeffrey Burke,

Thank you for considering Cask & Stream. Please find Quote Q-0001 for USD $4,000.00 attached as a PDF.

To confirm your order, please review the quote and sign electronically at the link below:

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Thank you,
Forest
Cask & Stream
